turnoverRate.note: Annual staff turnover rate in adult social care sector, England. Skills for Care workforce data.

vacancies.note: Estimated unfilled adult social care vacancies on a given day, England.

hourlyPay.note: Median hourly pay for care workers (direct care roles), England. Skills for Care. National Living Wage was £11.44 in 2024.

sources.name: Skills for Care
sources.dataset: The state of the adult social care sector and workforce in England

sources.name: Skills for Care
sources.dataset: Adult social care workforce data set — vacancies and turnover

sources.name: DHSC
sources.dataset: Adult social care activity and finance statistics

metadata.methodology: Turnover and vacancy data from Skills for Care Adult Social Care Workforce Data Set, the most comprehensive employer-level dataset for the sector covering approximately 25,000 organisations. Pay data is median hourly rate for care workers in direct care roles, excluding management. Vacancy rate calculated as vacancies as a proportion of filled posts.
knownIssues: Workforce dataset relies on employer returns — coverage varies by year, affecting comparability
Turnover figures include moves within the sector as well as exits — true attrition rate is lower
2022 vacancy spike partly reflects post-pandemic staff shortages and surge in demand post-lockdown
